code:
import{useState,useEffect,useCallback,useRef}from'react';import{SignalingClient}from'../services/signaling/SignalingClient';import{WebRTCClient}from'../services/webrtc/WebRTCClient';import{mediaDevicesService}from'../services/webrtc/MediaDevices';export function useWebRTC(_ref){let{roomId,role,userId}=_ref;const[localStream,setLocalStream]=useState(null);const[remoteStreams,setRemoteStreams]=useState(new Map());const[isConnected,setIsConnected]=useState(false);const[error,setError]=useState(null);const signalingClientRef=useRef(null);const webrtcClientRef=useRef(null);const initializeClients=useCallback(async()=>{try{// Initialize signaling client
const signalingClient=new SignalingClient('ws://localhost:8080/ws/signaling');await signalingClient.connect();signalingClientRef.current=signalingClient;// Join room
const joinResponse=await signalingClient.send({type:'join-room',roomId,role,userId});// Initialize WebRTC client
const webrtcClient=new WebRTCClient(signalingClient,roomId);await webrtcClient.initialize();webrtcClientRef.current=webrtcClient;// If joining as viewer and there are existing producers, consume them
if(role==='viewer'&&joinResponse.existingProducers&&joinResponse.existingProducers.length>0){console.log('Found existing producers:',joinResponse.existingProducers);// Create receive transport first
await webrtcClient.createRecvTransport();// Create a single remote stream to hold all tracks
const remoteStream=new MediaStream();// Consume each existing producer
for(const producer of joinResponse.existingProducers){try{await webrtcClient.consume(producer.producerId,track=>{console.log('Received remote track from existing producer:',track.kind);remoteStream.addTrack(track);});}catch(error){console.error('Error consuming existing producer:',error);}}// Add the combined stream to state
if(remoteStream.getTracks().length>0){setRemoteStreams(new Map([['remote',remoteStream]]));}}// Listen for new producers (for viewers)
signalingClient.on('new-producer',async message=>{console.log('New producer available:',message.producerId);if(role==='viewer'&&webrtcClientRef.current){try{// Create receive transport if not exists
if(!webrtcClientRef.current)return;await webrtcClientRef.current.consume(message.producerId,track=>{console.log('Received remote track:',track.kind);setRemoteStreams(prev=>{const newStreams=new Map(prev);// Get or create the remote stream
let stream=newStreams.get('remote');if(!stream){stream=new MediaStream();newStreams.set('remote',stream);}stream.addTrack(track);return newStreams;});});}catch(error){console.error('Error consuming producer:',error);setError("Failed to consume stream: ".concat(error.message));}}});setIsConnected(true);console.log('WebRTC clients initialized');}catch(error){console.error('Error initializing clients:',error);setError("Initialization failed: ".concat(error.message));throw error;}},[roomId,role,userId]);const startBroadcast=useCallback(async()=>{try{setError(null);if(!webrtcClientRef.current){await initializeClients();}// Get user media
const stream=await mediaDevicesService.getUserMedia({video:true,audio:true});setLocalStream(stream);// Create send transport
await webrtcClientRef.current.createSendTransport();// Produce tracks
for(const track of stream.getTracks()){await webrtcClientRef.current.produce(track);console.log("Producing ".concat(track.kind," track"));}console.log('Broadcasting started');}catch(error){console.error('Error starting broadcast:',error);setError("Failed to start broadcast: ".concat(error.message));}},[initializeClients]);const stopBroadcast=useCallback(()=>{if(localStream){mediaDevicesService.stopStream(localStream);setLocalStream(null);}if(webrtcClientRef.current){webrtcClientRef.current.close();webrtcClientRef.current=null;}console.log('Broadcasting stopped');},[localStream]);const joinAsViewer=useCallback(async()=>{try{setError(null);if(!webrtcClientRef.current){await initializeClients();}// Create receive transport
await webrtcClientRef.current.createRecvTransport();console.log('Joined as viewer');}catch(error){console.error('Error joining as viewer:',error);setError("Failed to join as viewer: ".concat(error.message));}},[initializeClients]);const leave=useCallback(()=>{if(webrtcClientRef.current){webrtcClientRef.current.close();webrtcClientRef.current=null;}if(signalingClientRef.current){signalingClientRef.current.send({type:'leave-room',roomId});signalingClientRef.current.close();signalingClientRef.current=null;}const currentStream=localStream;if(currentStream){mediaDevicesService.stopStream(currentStream);setLocalStream(null);}setRemoteStreams(new Map());setIsConnected(false);console.log('Left room');},[roomId,localStream]);// Cleanup on unmount only
useEffect(()=>{return()=>{// Cleanup on unmount
if(webrtcClientRef.current){webrtcClientRef.current.close();webrtcClientRef.current=null;}if(signalingClientRef.current){signalingClientRef.current.send({type:'leave-room',roomId});signalingClientRef.current.close();signalingClientRef.current=null;}if(localStream){mediaDevicesService.stopStream(localStream);}console.log('Cleanup on unmount');};},[]);// Empty deps array - only run on mount/unmount
return{localStream,remoteStreams,isConnected,error,startBroadcast,stopBroadcast,joinAsViewer,leave};}
